title: Bind governance evidence to the GitHub root of trust

claims.statement: GovernanceRun freshness compared profileHash, planHash, and manifestHash but did not require an externally expected repository, commit, ref, event, or pull request.

The main-branch GovernanceRun for commit b30afa3 has a GitHub provenance attestation bound to OverlayKit/overlaykit, refs/heads/main, the governance workflow, the exact source digest, and a GitHub-hosted runner.
OverlayKit/overlaykit had no repository rulesets when this change was specified.
A compiled trust anchor plus normalized GitHub observations can reject replay and context substitution without giving network evidence authority to redefine the plan.
GitHub-hosted runners provide the gh CLI and a repository-scoped token capable of reading Actions, pull requests, attestations, commits, and rulesets.
Whether attestation indexing can be delayed long enough to require bounded retries in the observer job.

successCriteria.statement: A GovernanceRun is stale when its repository, commit, ref, event, or pull request differs from the expected execution subject even if all contract hashes match.
successCriteria.verification: Automated replay test using content-identical evidence and a different commit.

successCriteria.statement: The GitHub observer binds evidence to the configured repository, workflow, run, job, check, runner class, and exact PR head and base.
successCriteria.verification: Automated valid and adversarial GitHub observation tests.

successCriteria.statement: Protected-main evidence is invalid unless its attestation matches the run file digest, source commit, ref, signer workflow, OIDC issuer, invocation, and GitHub-hosted runner.
successCriteria.verification: Automated attestation substitution tests and a successful main-branch observer run.

successCriteria.statement: Ruleset evidence has a canonical snapshot hash and reports missing required protections as activation blockers rather than claiming enforcement.
successCriteria.verification: Automated ruleset tamper and missing-protection tests.

successCriteria.statement: GitHub Actions emits both the GovernanceRun and a normalized GitHub observation artifact.
successCriteria.verification: Successful validate and observe jobs in the Constitution workflow.

definitionOfDone.statement: Governance host lint, type-check, tests, compilation, and verification pass.
The full monorepo quality suite and builds pass.
definitionOfDone.evidence: npm run check && npm run build

definitionOfDone.statement: plan.json and manifest.json include the trust anchor, new schema, and CHG-0002 without mutating ADR-0001.
Adversarial tests cover wrong commit, PR head, workflow, runner, attestation, and ruleset snapshot.
The workflow observe job records activationReady=false while the required main ruleset is absent.
